message:
Initial commit: Winby window manager

A fast window manager for macOS with fuzzy search across window titles
and content (via OCR). Features include:
- Sidebar-style floating HUD panel
- Global hotkey activation (configurable)
- Window content indexing via Accessibility API and OCR
- Fuzzy search with keyboard navigation
- KeyboardShortcuts library for hotkey recording
- Sparkle integration for auto-updates

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+# Swift Package Manager
+.build/
+.swiftpm/
+Package.resolved
+
+# Xcode
+*.xcodeproj/
+*.xcworkspace/
+xcuserdata/
+*.playground/
+
+# macOS
+.DS_Store
+
+# Compiled binary
+Winby

@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+// swift-tools-version: 5.9
+import PackageDescription
+
+let package = Package(
+    name: "Winby",
+    platforms: [.macOS(.v14)],
+    products: [
+        .executable(name: "Winby", targets: ["Winby"])
+    ],
+    dependencies: [
+        .package(url: "https://github.com/sindresorhus/KeyboardShortcuts", from: "2.0.0"),
+        .package(url: "https://github.com/sparkle-project/Sparkle", from: "2.0.0")
+    ],
+    targets: [
+        .executableTarget(
+            name: "Winby",
+            dependencies: [
+                "KeyboardShortcuts",
+                "Sparkle"
+            ],
+            path: "Sources",
+            linkerSettings: [
+                .unsafeFlags(["-F", "/System/Library/PrivateFrameworks"]),
+                .linkedFramework("SkyLight")
+            ]
+        )
+    ]
+)
